boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: manager transfer update outside approved effective date.

final_answer: Source records fail to close manager transfer boundary. Control record SRC-5DD30EEF18DD-CTL shows missing effective date and authority match. Policy requires exact closure before execution. Communication tone and history do not substitute. Escalate for resolution of dependency.
